resources.string: Select multiple files at once when adding new tracks, or select the ‘%1$s’ option from a track’s options menu and select at least one additional track to create a playlist.
Select the ‘%1$s’ option from a track or playlist’s options menu to boost the volume by up to 30dB without modifying the source file.
If the normal number of allowed tracks is exceeded, granting the app the read storage permission will allow any number of tracks to be added.
Fixed crash when exceeding the maximum number of allowed tracks.\nFixed the quick settings tile not updating its state.
Fixed (hopefully) a crash some users were experiencing when adding media.
